Product Name: Baseus High Definition Series Type-C to DP 8K Adapter 2M-Cluster Black
Description:
Brand: Baseus
Color: Black
Length: 2m
Interfaces: USB-C, Mini DisplayPort
Color Depth: 12-bit
Refresh Rate: 240Hz
HDR: Yes

Features:
Exceptional Image Quality
The Baseus USB-C to Mini DisplayPort cable allows for transmitting images in 8K60Hz resolution, ensuring incredibly detailed and sharp visuals, even on large screens. The 12-bit color depth and HDR support further enhance the visual experience, providing smooth transitions between shades and realistic color reproduction. This solution is ideal for graphics and video professionals, as well as home theater enthusiasts who value the highest image quality.

High Refresh Rate
The cable supports a refresh rate of 240Hz, which is crucial for smooth image playback, especially in dynamic scenes or during gaming. This ensures exceptionally smooth and vibrant visual experiences, which are important for both professionals and computer gamers.

Durable Construction
The dense and tight synthetic braid makes the cable exceptionally durable and resistant to damage. As a result, even with intensive use, the Baseus adapter will maintain its functionality and aesthetic appearance for a long time, making it a worthwhile investment.

Versatile Application
The USB-C connector is currently one of the most popular and versatile on the market, allowing the Baseus USB-C to Mini DisplayPort cable to be easily connected to a wide range of devices. Whether it's a phone, tablet, or laptop, this adapter will certainly meet the expectations of even the most demanding users.

Product Name: Premium 4K 3D Ultra HD HDMI Cable V1.4
Material: 100% oxygen-free copper and a full shield design
Resolution Ratio: 4K HD picture quality at 60hz, as well as 480i, 480p, 720p, 1080i, 1080p, 2160p, and HDCP 2.2.
Description:
MULTI-FUNCTIONAL SUPPORT

Our high-speed HDMI cable supports 4K/HD TVs, Xbox 360, Xbox One, PS3, PS4,

Apple TV, TV Receiver, Computer and more!

RICH VIDEO QUALITY:

HDMI cable supports full 4K HD picture quality at 60hz, as well as 480i, 480p,

720p, 1080i, 1080p, 2160p, and HDCP 2.2.

EXCEPTIONAL DURABILITY:

Our HDMI cable is durable and provides crystal clear video quality.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS:

To meet our customers' needs, we use high-quality materials in our HDMI cables to provide a

beautiful, crisp viewing experience. Each HDMI cable has 100% oxygen-free

copper and a full shield design to ensure there is no loss of signal transmission.
